nasb.text: Say to Archippus, “Take heed to the ministry which you have received in the Lord, that you may fulfill it.”

esv.text: And say to Archippus, “See that you fulfill the ministry that you have received in the Lord.”

cnv.text: 你們要對亞基布說：“你要留心在主裡領受的職分，好把它完成。”

ccb.text: 请告诉亚基布务要完成主交给他的工作。

csbs.text: 请你们告诉阿其波斯：“在主里所领受的服事工作，要留心把它完成。”
